name: The Green Dragon Tavern — Back Room
description: A small room with a table, two chairs, and a shuttered window that opens onto the stable yard. Thomas Wren uses it for accounts — and for other things. Tonight a candle burns on the table and the second chair is empty.
atmosphericDetails: A map of the roads north of Boston is spread on the table, weighted at the corners with coins.
From the stable yard beyond the shuttered window, you can hear horses moving — they have been saddled.
The candle on the table has burned down two inches — someone has been waiting here for a while.
